aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Total Comfort HVAC Service due to insufficient conversational content and missing authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC queries.
Enhance website content with detailed service explanations and local relevance.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Denver' and 'best HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with structured data to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the machines that power modern search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ content and structured data, causing AI models to overlook their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates conversational content, structured data, and authority signals to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: The Missing Piece in Your HVAC Marketing Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
